place: Cherngtalay, Bang Tao, Thalang District, Phuket, Thailand
title: Three-Storey Multi-Flex Lagoon House, Bang Tao – Cherngtalay
blurb: A three-storey "multi-flex" house with a rooftop garden, set beside a private lagoon in Bang Tao – Cherngtalay, Phuket. A double-frontage design that works as a multigenerational home or a residence with a home office, with residents-only lake club access. Off-plan, from ฿39,800,000.
detail:
On the Cherngtalay side of a private lagoon community in Bang Tao, this is a three-storey house designed around flexibility. Its "double-frontage" plan gives it two faces: a serene residential front opening to the tranquillity of the lagoon, and a second frontage connecting to the surrounding Cherngtalay neighbourhood — so the home adapts to however you live.

Across three levels and a rooftop garden, the layout flexes between a multigenerational family home, a residence with a dedicated home office, or a live-and-invest configuration. Generous open-plan living and dining spaces open through full-height glazing to a private pool and garden, finished in a warm, contemporary palette.

Homes range from about 380 to 422 m² of built area on 240 m² plots, balancing privacy with an easy connection to nature and to one of Phuket's most established lifestyle quarters.

Residents share the community's members-only lake club — lap and kids pools, a hydrotherapy zone, sauna and ice bath, gym and private studio, co-working lounge, sun decks and 24-hour security. Bang Tao Beach is roughly ten minutes away, with Porto de Phuket about four minutes and Boat Avenue five. Offered off-plan from ฿39,800,000.
